name: song-builder
note: M-13 SONG BUILDER LZ (operator keyword 2026-07-11): Compose section buffer -> multi-section custom song. Persona at 412x915: build C-F-G, add as Verse, add Am, add as Chorus, assert 2 buffer sections, arm-guard a buffer chip remove (first tap must NOT remove), Assemble, assert the song view shows BOTH section headers (Verse, Chorus) + chord bars. Red-first: #songAddBtn is absent before the build so step 6 fails. S-COMPOSE-CALM (2026-07-19): capture enters via the Save sheet (Grow it into a song) - the tray is transaction chrome now, never ambient; every add lands on the canvas, and the Build-the-chords hop re-arms the loop for the next section. Captures CLEAR the strip everywhere (one contract).

steps.label: the jam surface stays clean - the tray is transaction chrome (S-COMPOSE-CALM)
one buffered section; the capture CLEARED the strip (one contract everywhere)
set the second section label to Chorus
first tap ARMS the chip remover, nothing removed
Save song opens the naming row (the deliberate canvas save); name it and confirm
steps.js: (function(){var row=document.querySelector('.composeRow');if(!row||row.hidden)return false;var inp=row.querySelector('input');if(!inp)return false;inp.value='Builder test song';var btns=row.querySelectorAll('button');for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){if(/save/i.test(btns[i].textContent)){btns[i].click();return true;}}return false;})()

steps.label: song view shows two section headers (Verse + Chorus)
the song view renders the section chords
steps.js: (function(){var pr=document.getElementById('s-practice');if(!pr)return false;var t=pr.textContent;return t.indexOf('Verse')>=0 && t.indexOf('Chorus')>=0 && t.indexOf('Am')>=0 && t.indexOf('G')>=0 && t.indexOf('F')>=0;})()
